issues.comment: build_mock_occurrence_and_event is called with value 6 but the test passes value 100 in group_vals, causing test assertion to fail due to mismatched expected vs actual occurrence data.
build_mock_occurrence_and_event is called with value 6 but the test passes value 8 in group_vals, causing test assertion to fail due to mismatched expected vs actual occurrence data.
build_mock_occurrence_and_event() called with group_key="val1" but expected result uses group_key="group_key", causing test assertion to fail due to mismatched fingerprints.
